channel.title: Codehaks | Engineering-Driven CAD Solutions
channel.description: Recent content on Codehaks | Engineering-Driven CAD Solutions

item.title: CodeHaks TotalLength
item.description: Open-source AutoCAD plugin for calculating total length of selected objects

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m a Senior Software Developer with a Mechanical Engineering background and 16+ years of experience building custom plugins and automation tools for AutoCAD, SolidWorks, and Revit.

Most CAD developers are software engineers who learned CAD. I’m a mechanical engineer who became a software engineer — so I read your engineering problem first and design the right tool for it, instead of building a clever plugin nobody uses.

What I do:

item.title: Simplify Your Workflow: Calculate Total Length in AutoCAD with CodeHaks TotalLength
item.description:
Measuring multiple lines, polylines, and arcs in AutoCAD can be a repetitive task. Manually summing their lengths is not only time-consuming but also prone to errors.

To solve this, CodeHaks TotalLength offers a simple, dedicated interface to automate this process. It’s a lightweight add-on designed specifically for AutoCAD 2024 and 2025.
